name: Yorkshire Pudding with Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Place butter and oil in a 13x9-inch pan and put it in the oven to melt and warm the pan.
3. In a saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons margarine over low heat.
4. Meanwhile, beat eggs in a medium bowl with a whisk. Add flour in four additions.
5. Stir in 2-3 tablespoons of melted margarine from the saucepan and salt into the egg mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the hot baking pan.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 425°F.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 5 minutes until fluffy and brown around the edges and firm.
9. While the pudding is baking, cook onion in 1 tablespoon remaining margarine in a saucepan until tender.
10. Add beef, gravy, and frozen mixed vegetables to the onions; cook until vegetables are tender (about 10 minutes).
11. Spoon the meat mixture over the baked batter and serve.
